name: L T Transportation
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); SAFER keyword search for 'L T TRANSPORTATION' returned no matches; only 'L & T TRANSPORTATION LLC' (Houston TX, USDOT 1042811) and 'L & T TRANSPORTATION LOGISTICS CORP' (Kissimmee FL, USDOT 3103651) — neither matches Baltimore MD address. No Maryland SDAT record located via web search; entity may be a sole proprietorship or trade name only.

name: Hartleys School Bus Inc
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER keyword search for HARTLEYS returned 11 carriers but the only school bus match is HARTLEYS SCHOOL BUSES INC (USDOT 341237) in Rugby, ND — confirmed unrelated GA listing per company history (Hartley Hageness, founded 1969 in ND). Listed GA address 4034 Waters End Ln, Snellville, GA 30039 is a residential street, consistent with a sole-proprietor/owner-operator. No Georgia SOS public match readily located.

name: Matthews Bus Co Inc Sch Buses
notes: Listed legal name in SAFER is CARRIER MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, DBA MATTHEWS BUS COMPANY (USDOT 1245654). Operating entity headquartered at 1112 First Street, Jefferson Hills, PA — different from the rank-list address (4 River Rd, McKees Rocks, PA 15136), which is the known McKees Rocks yard/terminal of Matthews Bus Company (confirmed via Yelp, McKees Rocks CDC, NELLC). 152 power units / 170 drivers consistent with a multi-site PA school bus operator. Matthews Bus is now owned by Summit School Services (formerly part of National Express LLC). Other SAFER hits (MATTHEWS BUSES INC USDOT 1879991 in Ballston Spa NY; MATTHEWS BUS ALLIANCE INC USDOT 2995127 DBA Matthews Buses Florida in Orlando) are separate Matthews Buses dealer/affiliate entities. PA Dept of State direct search was blocked; medium confidence on DBA match.

name: Grady's Bus Ctr
